Discussed on [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]].<ref>https://youtu.be/Mdw8_fnaZTo</ref><ref>https://youtu.be/Syt76ZvXK6k</ref>

Needs a lot more work. Contemplating a series on Islam alone, perhaps reacting to lets talk religion

== References ==
<references />
[[Category:Religions]]
[[sn:Islam]][[Category:Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
